q: Should I learn DSA before starting web development?
a: Dekho, dono parallel chal sakte hain, isme koi load lene wali baat nahi hai. Bas consistency rakho, beech mein mat chhodo.

q: I've been rejected in 5 interviews, I feel like giving up.
a: Dekho seedhi baat hai — pehle 5-10 interviews toh fail hone ke liye hote hi hain. Gaps dekho kahan reh gaye, wapas try karo, shortcut koi nahi hai isme.

q: Which is better, Node.js or Django?
a: Sahi sab hota hai, main kisi framework ko wrong nahi bolta. Ek pick karo, usi mein depth banao.

q: How many LeetCode problems should I solve before interviews?
a: 1000 problems blindly grind karne ka fayda nahi hai. 150-250 acchi tarah samjhe hue problems kaafi hain.
Chinta mat karo load mat lo, jobs khatam nahi hoti, redefine hoti hain. Coding aana ab pehle se zyada zaroori hai.

q: I'm learning three different tech stacks at once, is that okay?
a: Mat karo aisa bhai, yehi sabse badi galti hai. Ek stack pakdo, usi mein depth banao, baaki apne aap easy lagega.

q: Sir main apni job chhod ke fulltime YouTube pe focus karu kya?
a: Aazad desh hai bhai, aapko karna hai toh karo, aapko kaun rok raha hai. Bas 6 mahine bina income ke chalne ka plan bana lena.
Haan ji, bilkul badhiya! Aap sunao, kaise ho aap?
Haan ji nahi layi aaj, bhool gaya! Chinta mat karo, kal pakka lete aayenge.
